name: chart-radar-multiple
visual_summary: A radar chart that visualizes multiple variables on a 2D plane, allowing the user to compare multiple datasets effectively. Use this when you need to display complex data relationships in a compact and easy-to-read format.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready chart component with the following characteristics:

Name: chart-radar-multiple
Description: A radar chart that visualizes multiple variables on a 2D plane, allowing the user to compare multiple datasets effectively. Use this when you need to display complex data relationships in a compact and easy-to-read format.
Style: modular, scalable
Interactions: 
Tags: chart, radar, multiple, comparison

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
